definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Cada uno / Cada una]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Each of the students passed.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para referirse a cada miembro individual de un grupo por separado.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun to refer to every individual member of a group separately.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Both parents are here.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante antes de un sustantivo plural para significar 'los dos'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a determiner before a plural noun to mean 'the two'.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Both are correct.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para significar 'los dos'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun to mean 'the two of them'.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He has few friends.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante para un número pequeño (contable, sentido negativo).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a determiner for a small number (countable, negative meaning).

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Many tried, but few succeeded.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para un número pequeño de personas o cosas.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun for a small number of people or things.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I have many friends.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante para un gran número (contable).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a determiner for a large number (countable).

definitions.usage_example: Many are called, but few are chosen.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Many are called, but few are chosen.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para un gran número de personas o cosas.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun for a large number of people or things.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He made several mistakes.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante para un número mediano (más de dos, pero no muchos).]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a determiner for a medium number (more than two, but not many).

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Several of them are broken.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para un número mediano de personas o cosas.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun for a medium number of people or things.

definitions.usage_example: How much money is left? None.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: How much money is left? None.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para significar 'nada' o 'ninguno'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun to mean 'not any' or 'no one'.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: You can take either road.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante para significar 'uno u otro' de dos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a determiner to mean 'one or the other' of two.

definitions.usage_example: Which one do you want? Either is fine.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Which one do you want? Either is fine.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para significar 'uno u otro'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun to mean 'one or the other'.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Neither answer is correct.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante para significar 'ni uno ni el otro' de dos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a determiner to mean 'not one and not the other' of two.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Neither is correct.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre para significar 'ni uno ni el otro'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a pronoun to mean 'not one and not the other'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Cada uno de nosotros]
definitions.usage_example: Each of us has a different task.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE each of us AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Each of us has a different task.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Cada individuo en el grupo 'nosotros', considerado por separado.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Every individual in the group 'we', considered separately.

definitions.usage_example: None of them knew the answer.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE none of them AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: None of them knew the answer.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Ni uno solo de un grupo específico de 'ellos'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Not one of a specific group of 'them'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: La mayoría de ellos/as]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE most of them AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Most of them are students.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: La parte más grande de un grupo específico de 'ellos'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The largest part of a specific group of 'them'.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE some of us AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Some of us are tired.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Un número no especificado del grupo 'nosotros'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: An unspecified number of the group 'we'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Uno de ellos / Una de ellas]
definitions.usage_example: One of them is the leader.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE one of them AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: One of them is the leader.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Un solo miembro de un grupo específico de 'ellos'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A single member of a specific group of 'them'.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE both of us AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Both of us are ready.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Las dos personas en el grupo 'nosotros'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The two people in the group 'we'.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE neither of them AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Neither of them spoke.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Ni uno ni el otro de un grupo específico de dos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Not one and not the other of a specific group of two.

definitions.usage_example: You can ask either of them.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE either of them AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: You can ask either of them.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Uno u otro de un grupo específico de dos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: One or the other of a specific group of two.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE all of us AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: All of us are ready.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El grupo entero de 'nosotros'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The entire group of 'we'.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE all of them AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I invited all of them.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El grupo entero de 'ellos'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The entire group of 'them'.

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE some of them AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Some of them are late.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Un número no especificado de un grupo específico de 'ellos'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: An unspecified number of a specific group of 'them'.

definitions.usage_example: Part of us wanted to stay.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE part of us AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Part of us wanted to stay.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una sección o porción del grupo 'nosotros'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A section or portion of the group 'we'.
